sha256:5720618f7be6ea4425df775acfa5491d9.title: BG Check: True Metrix GO fingerstick = 121 mg/dL (per Maria reading the meter directly). CGM showed 72 Flat at the same time — a ~49 mg/dL discrepancy (~40% error, FAR beyond normal CGM accuracy of 15% MARD / Libre 3's 7-9%). Daytime upright false-low, not compression. Combined with this morning's 06:55 event and prior nights, this is a clear and reproducible defect pattern on a recall-clear sensor — strong basis for an Abbott replacement request.
